penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. The task appears to end with objects still on the opposite side and not returned to the original positions.

reasoning: The video shows the beginning of peg transfer with objects being moved from left to right side. However, the task appears incomplete as there is no clear evidence of all six objects being transferred to the opposite side and then returned to the original side. The video cuts to different content before showing task completion, suggesting this is an incomplete attempt that would receive maximum time penalty.
